arcs.description: Read two sensor tokens without consuming them.

description: An elevator dispatches a car to a pending call only when both floor sensors are reporting. The two sensor tokens are READ with weight 2 (test-without-consume): dispatch requires both present and sees both in its binding, but neither is removed, so the sensors keep reporting for the next dispatch.
name: elevator-dispatch

places.description: Holds the floor-sensor readings currently reporting.
places.name: sensors

transitions.description: Send a car to a pending call once both sensors report.
transitions.name: dispatch_car
